The 28 command_injection + 92 sql_injection are real Rust source code findings (or test fixture detections), NOT closes-#24-class string-literal FPs. Zero closes-#24-class FPs.

NONE reference HtmlOutput/FileOpen/HttpRequest/Deserialize — the 4 new TaintSinkType variants from M1 carry adequate doc-comments.
